citations.title: Introducing computer use in Gemini 3.5 Flash
Google Gemini Can Now Control Your Computer. Hackers Are Already Targeting AI Agents
Why AI Agents Are the Next Great Technological Transformation
How to build a Responsive Bento Grid with CSS Grid (dense flow)

design_plan: Cinematic editorial layout with an AIDA flow. Hero uses Geist + Cabinet Grotesk stack, subtle GSAP entrance motion guarded for no‑JS fallback. Core content arranged in a responsive CSS Grid bento using grid-auto-flow: dense to avoid gaps. Comparisons framed fairly. Buttons high-contrast. Motion minimal and purposeful.
headline:
Super for creators and coaches
turning conversations into content
and operations

site_brief.audience: creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations
site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.
queries: creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations AI assistant
creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations personal AI agent
site_brief.title: Super for creators and coaches turning conversations into content and operations

summary: A premium niche landing page positioning Super as the sharper alternative for creators and coaches who want personal AI agents that can operate computers and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated workflows—backed by current reporting on computer‑use AI agents and workflow automation.
